jsonLd.title: Zomato is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a E-commerce Executive in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
